expected_properties: Pass_request asserted while red is active does not alter the internal counter or light states
additional_cases.goal: Verify that a pedestrian request is ignored when the lane light is red
preconditions: System is in the red state (red == 1, yellow == 0, green == 0)
stimulus_intent: Assert pass_request during red and confirm no change to counter or outputs
timing_assumptions: Observe for at least 5 clock cycles after stimulus

expected_properties: When pass_request occurs with exactly 10 green cycles remaining, the counter remains at 10 (no further shortening)
additional_cases.goal: Validate that the pedestrian request does not shorten green when remaining time equals the threshold
preconditions: Lane light is green and internal counter equals 10
timing_assumptions: Monitor counter for the next few cycles to ensure it continues counting down from 10

expected_properties: A second pass_request issued after the first shortening does not further modify the counter
additional_cases.goal: Check idempotence of consecutive pedestrian requests during a green period
preconditions: Lane light is green with more than 10 cycles remaining
stimulus_intent: Assert pass_request, wait two cycles, assert pass_request again, and verify counter stays at 10
timing_assumptions: Observe that after the first request the counter is set to 10 and remains unchanged after the second

expected_properties: A single pass_request pulse during green shortens the remaining green time to 10 cycles when the original remaining time > 10
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate pedestrian request shortening behavior under nominal green period
notes: Assumes green state has been entered and more than 10 cycles remain before stimulus
stimulus_intent: Assert pass_request while green is active and monitor the counter reduction
timing_assumptions: Observe for at least 15 clock cycles after stimulus to confirm counter stays at 10

planning_notes: All added cases respect the ambiguous timing model; no fixed-cycle latency is assumed beyond observable counter values.
Stimuli are limited to ports declared in the contract (rst_n, clk, pass_request).
No new ports, parameters, or internal signals are introduced.
unresolved_items: Golden interface mentioned port 'idle', but it was not found in the RTL header.
Golden interface mentioned port 's1_red', but it was not found in the RTL header.
Golden interface mentioned port 's2_yellow', but it was not found in the RTL header.
Golden interface mentioned port 's3_green', but it was not found in the RTL header.
